name: Gorgias
description: Monitor Gorgias e-commerce helpdesk for agent access and customer support compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Gorgias at https://yourstore.gorgias.com
2. Go to Settings → REST API
3. Generate an API key
4. Base64 encode 'your_email:api_key'
5. Enter your subdomain and encoded credentials below

credentialFields.label: Subdomain
credentialFields.helpText: Your Gorgias subdomain (e.g. mystore from mystore.gorgias.com)

credentialFields.label: Encoded Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'email:api_key'. Found in Gorgias Settings → REST API. Command: echo -n 'email@company.com:api_key' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Gorgias agent accounts with access to customer conversations

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Gorgias helpdesk is active for customer support
